title: Public TOB1/SLT/native-binary raw fixture search ledger
license: Mixed upstream sources; review each lead before download or redistribution
source_note: This ledger records public leads for closing raw_binary_tob1_slt. Documentation-only leads explain format support but are not parity fixtures.

qc_mapping.reason: Search leads do not contain normalized EddyPro flux outputs.

known_limitations: No lead in this manifest is promoted to a raw-to-final fixture.
Documentation-only leads cannot satisfy high-frequency raw input, EddyPro project/settings, official Full_Output, normalized reference, or closure-acceptance evidence.
Downloadable public TOB1/SLT/native-binary data still needs hash validation, metadata inference, EddyPro output normalization, registration, and acceptance before it can change the parity claim gate.
Source-derived TOB1, SLT, and generic native-binary conformance fixtures are registered separately to keep importer development moving, but they are not field-data substitutes.

searched_patterns: download TOB1 eddy covariance raw data Campbell EddyPro Full_Output
search_status.promotion_blocker: No public lead currently contains the complete registration bundle: redistributable TOB1/SLT/native raw data, EddyPro project/settings, Full_Output, normalized reference, provenance, and acceptance evidence.
search_status.fallback_strategy: Use EddyPro engine source-derived conformance fixtures for importer parity while keeping real field-data blockers open.

source_derived_fallback.truthfulness_boundary: This fixture proves source-derived TOB1 import and pipeline conformance only; it does not close the real TOB1/SLT/native binary field fixture blocker.

source_derived_fallbacks.truthfulness_boundary: This fixture proves source-derived TOB1 import and pipeline conformance only; it does not close the real TOB1/SLT/native binary field fixture blocker.
This fixture proves source-derived EdiSol SLT import and pipeline conformance only; it does not close the real TOB1/SLT/native binary field fixture blocker.
This fixture proves source-derived EddySoft SLT import, high-resolution analog mask handling, and pipeline conformance only; it does not close the real TOB1/SLT/native binary field fixture blocker.

This fixture proves source-derived generic native-binary import, ASCII header skipping, record framing, mixed column type handling, and pipeline conformance only; it does not close the real TOB1/SLT/native binary field fixture blocker.
